summary: The available evidence does not support the use of body diffusion-weighted MRI in detecting uterine endometrial cancer during nonenhanced MRI scans because specific details about this technique are absent. Thus, based solely on the presented content, diffusion-weighted imaging lacks proven benefit for this application.
